text.title: Staging Smoke Checklist by Surface Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Staging Smoke Checklist by Surface end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: pick-top-3-surfaces
step.input: Recent feature impact + APM error volume + revenue path.
step.action: Rank surfaces by user impact, revenue dependency, regression risk; keep top 3.
step.decision-gate: Reject if list >3 or any surface lacks an observable verification.

step.name: draft-click-expect-items
step.action: For each surface write 2-5 click-expect items covering happy plus failure path.
step.decision-gate: Reject items not in click-expect shape.

step.name: commit-to-repo
step.action: Save to ops/staging-smoke.md; commit to main; reference from deploy script.
step.decision-gate: Reject if path is outside repo or file is gitignored.

step.name: run-and-sign
step.action: Execute each item; if any fails, abort; else type Signed: initials UTC-timestamp build:SHA at file end.
step.decision-gate: Reject promotion if sign-off line absent or stub.

step.name: promote-gate
step.action: Deploy script greps for the sign-off line + build SHA; exits non-zero if missing.
